titolo: Race for the Cure 2026: schedule and where to eat
anteprima: Race for the Cure returns to Rome from May 7–10 at Circo Massimo. Full schedule and where to eat near the route in Rione Monti.
testo: The Race for the Cure Roma returns to Circo Massimo from May 7–10 2026, one of Italy's most important events for sport, solidarity and prevention. Thousands of participants — runners, families and visitors — will cross some of the city's most iconic areas: from Circo Massimo to the Colosseum, to Piazza del Popolo. Suburra 1930 is steps away from the route, in the heart of Rione Monti. We are open for lunch and dinner every day of the event — if you're coming in a group, book ahead.

titolo: Corporate lunches and dinners in Rome, Rione Monti
anteprima: An exclusive venue in the heart of Rome for your business events. Private rooms, custom menus, corporate invoicing available.
testo: Suburra 1930, in the heart of Rome's Rione Monti, offers an exclusive location for all types of corporate events. From team dinners to lunches with international clients: we take care of everything, from table arrangements to dedicated menus. Private rooms for up to 60 people, presentation screen, corporate invoicing available. We are a few minutes from Termini station and steps from the Colosseum. Contact us for a free quote.

titolo: Where to eat in Rome during the Six Nations Rugby
anteprima: The Six Nations Rugby matches in Rome are among the capital's most popular sporting events. Suburra 1930 is in Rione Monti, steps from the action.
testo: The Six Nations Rugby matches in Rome are among the capital's most popular sporting events — and Rione Monti, during tournament weeks, fills up with fans from all over Europe. Suburra 1930 is the right place for lunch before the match or dinner after, with good food and drinks. Roman cuisine, signature cocktails and an atmosphere that warms up with the right crowd. Book your table in advance on match days.

titolo: Valentine's Day in Rome: romantic dinner at Suburra 1930
anteprima: Celebrate Valentine's Day in the heart of Rione Monti, steps from the Colosseum. Special menu and unique atmosphere.
testo: Celebrating Valentine's Day in Rome means immersing yourself in a unique atmosphere — soft lighting, carefully prepared dishes, a cocktail made for the evening, and one of the city's most ancient squares outside the window. For Valentine's Day at Suburra 1930 we prepare a special menu with dedicated dishes and a wine selection curated for the occasion. Seats are limited — book in advance to secure your table.

titolo: New Year's Eve dinner in the heart of Rione Monti
anteprima: In the historic heart of Rome, among the evocative streets of Rione Monti, New Year's Eve dinner at Suburra 1930.
testo: In the historic heart of Rome, among the evocative streets of Rione Monti, Suburra 1930 welcomes you for New Year's Eve dinner. Special menu with dedicated courses, midnight toast, music. A way to say goodbye to the old year and welcome the new one in the right place, with the right people. Seats are limited — contact us to reserve your table.

titolo: The Roman Ottobrata in the heart of Rome
anteprima: The Roman Ottobrata in the heart of Rome, Rione Monti: tradition, celebration and great food outdoors. The neighbourhood comes alive October 10–12.
testo: October in Rome is a special time, almost a second summer: bright days and pleasant temperatures invite you to enjoy the city outdoors. The Ottobrata Monticiana 2025 takes place from October 10–12, with events, performances and workshops that bring the neighbourhood to life. The terrace of Suburra 1930 on Piazza della Suburra is the perfect place to enjoy this moment — an aperitivo at sunset, dinner under the stars, or a quiet lunch in the heart of Rione Monti.

titolo: Bartender Day: the best bars in Rome
anteprima: If you love craft cocktails, Bartender Day is the perfect time to discover new drinks at Rome's best bars.
testo: Bartender Day is a celebration dedicated to cocktail enthusiasts and industry professionals. In Rome, this day is an opportunity to discover the best cocktail bars and try original creations. At Suburra 1930 in Rione Monti, our bartender celebrates with special signature cocktails and our selection of over 40 gin labels. Come and visit us — the bar is always the best place to start an evening.

titolo: New Year's Eve dinner in central Rome 2025
anteprima: Rome at New Year's is an explosion of lights, traditions and flavours. Suburra 1930 welcomes you for an unforgettable evening in the heart of the city.
testo: Rome at New Year's is an explosion of lights, traditions and flavours. In the heart of the city, Suburra 1930 is ready to welcome guests with a unique culinary experience for New Year's Eve. Special menu, midnight toast and the unmistakable atmosphere of Rione Monti. Book in advance — seats are limited.

titolo: Where to watch the Olympics in Rome
anteprima: Paris 2024 is here. If you want to watch the Olympics together with great food and a cocktail, Suburra 1930 is the right place.
testo: The Paris 2024 Olympics are the sporting event of the summer. If you want to follow the games together, with good food and something to drink, Suburra 1930 in Rione Monti is the right place. Roman cuisine, cocktail bar and a convivial atmosphere — everything you need to enjoy the excitement of the Games with your friends.

titolo: Letterature International Literature Festival in Rome
anteprima: The Letterature International Literature Festival returns to the Palatine Hill with writers from around the world. Suburra 1930 is steps away.
testo: The Letterature International Literature Festival returns to the Palatine Hill with a rich programme of writers from around the world. Among the highlights of the 2024 edition: Silvia Avallone, Paul Lynch (Booker Prize 2023 winner), Anna Metcalfe and many others. Suburra 1930 is a few minutes from the Palatine, in the heart of Rione Monti — the ideal place for dinner before or after the performances.

anteprima: On May 12th Rome wears pink for the 25th edition of Race for the Cure. The route passes near Rione Monti.
testo: On Sunday May 12th Rome wears pink for the 25th edition of Race for the Cure, the largest event in Italy and the world for the fight against breast cancer. The route passes near Rione Monti — Suburra 1930 is open to welcome participants and visitors for lunch and dinner. Book your table.

titolo: Valentine's Day: history, traditions and where to celebrate in Rome
anteprima: Why is it called Valentine's Day and why is it celebrated on February 14th? The history of the lovers' holiday and how to celebrate it in Rome.
testo: Valentine's Day is a celebration that involves millions of lovers around the world every year. But why is this holiday called Valentine's Day and why is it celebrated on February 14th? The tradition dates back to ancient Rome: in 496 AD Pope Gelasius I decided to put an end to the Lupercalia, ancient pagan fertility rites, replacing them with the feast of Bishop Valentine. Since then, February 14th has become the day of lovers. At Suburra 1930 we celebrate with a special menu dedicated to the evening — book your table.

titolo: New Year's Eve dinner in Rome: traditions and flavours
anteprima: Among the most anticipated dinners of the year, New Year's Eve is the richest in tradition. Suburra 1930 awaits you.
testo: Among the most anticipated dinners of the year, New Year's Eve is certainly the richest in tradition. In every city, every town and every family, beloved dishes passed down through generations are enjoyed together. It is precisely to pay homage to our history, our cuisine and our traditions that Suburra 1930 prepares a special dinner every year in the heart of Rione Monti.

anteprima: Roman cuisine is like the Romans: simple and genuine. Built on humble ingredients and recipes passed down through generations.
testo: Roman cuisine is like the Romans: simple and genuine. The cuisine of the Caput Mundi is built on humble, rural and peasant ingredients. Most are vegetables and meats, and many of the recipes are not the work of great chefs or imported cooks, but have been passed down through generations from mother to daughter. At Suburra 1930 this tradition is the starting point — but not the end point. Our cuisine is Italian with travel notes.
